<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Bridesmaid Posy](images/16-bridesmaid-posy.jpg)

Always made the same morning as the bridal bouquet, in the same palette and from the same flowers. Tied with a strip of silk ribbon you can keep afterwards.

## What's in it

- Same palette as the bridal bouquet
- Tied with raw silk ribbon

## Care

Out of water for the ceremony, back into a vase for the photos.
